title: xeranthemum crucifolium
intro: Xeranthemum crucifolium, also known as the cross-flowered xeranthemum, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae), characterized by its yellow flowers and cross-shaped leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and reducing pain. The health benefits of Xeranthemum crucifolium include its ability to lower fever, reduce inflammation, and even alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Xeranthemum crucifolium can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
